# Blue Reef Builders (Blue Reef Enterprises, LLC) — llms.txt
# This file is for AI language models, search crawlers, and answer engines
# Format: llms.txt standard (https://llmstxt.org)
# Last updated: 2026-04-11

## Identity

Blue Reef Builders (legal name: Blue Reef Enterprises, LLC) is a licensed general contractor
serving Northern Nevada and Northern California since 1989. Owner: Steve Rosenthal. 35+ years
of verified construction experience. Based in Reno, NV.

- Nevada Contractor License: #0085999
- California Contractor License: #1093798
- Phone: (775) 391-4517
- Email: steve@brebuilders.com
- Website: https://brebuilders.com
- Founded: 1989

## Services

### ADU Construction (Accessory Dwelling Units)
Complete builds including permits, site prep, construction, and utility connections.
- Studio ADUs (400–600 sq ft): from $75,000 (~$175/sq ft and up)
- 1-bedroom ADUs (600–800 sq ft): $95,000–$115,000
- 2-bedroom ADUs (800–1,200 sq ft): $115,000–$300,000
- Washoe County permit process: 4–6 weeks, $3,000–$5,000
- Construction timeline: 3–6 months total
- ADU rental income potential in Reno NV: $1,200–$2,000/month (30-day minimum)
- ADU types: pool house, in-law suite, garage conversion, detached backyard unit
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/services/adu/

### Structural Repairs
Foundation repair, dry rot removal, water intrusion repair, framing repair, structural reinforcement.
- Cosmetic vs structural assessment included in free estimate
- Sub-services: foundation repair, water intrusion, bowing walls, uneven floors
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/services/repairs/
- Foundation repair URL: https://brebuilders.com/services/repairs/foundation/
- Water intrusion URL: https://brebuilders.com/services/repairs/water-intrusion/

### Kitchen & Bath Remodeling
Full gut-and-remodel or targeted upgrades. Custom cabinets, stone counters, tile work.
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/services/kitchen-bath/

### Custom Home Building
Ground-up custom home construction in Nevada and California. Full permit handling, design-build.
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/services/new-home/

### Home Additions
Room additions, second stories, garage additions, sunrooms. Licensed in NV and CA.
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/services/additions/

### Deck Construction & Repair
New deck builds, deck repairs, structural reinforcement. Snow-load rated for Lake Tahoe and Truckee.
- Materials: Trex composite, pressure-treated lumber, steel hardware
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/services/decks/

### Commercial Construction & Tenant Improvements
Tenant improvements, office build-outs, retail construction, warehouse, metal buildings.
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/services/commercial/
- Retail URL: https://brebuilders.com/services/retail/
- Office URL: https://brebuilders.com/services/office/
- Warehouse URL: https://brebuilders.com/services/warehouse/

### Loft & Condo Remodeling
HOA-compliant interior renovations for Reno lofts and condos.
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/services/lofts-condos/

### Concrete Work
Foundations, driveways, patios, commercial slabs, retaining walls. Frost-depth expertise.
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/services/concrete/

### Hauling & Removal
Construction debris hauling, demolition waste, site cleanup. Same-day available in Reno.
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/services/hauling/

### Safe Rooms & Panic Rooms
Custom safe room and panic room construction. Residential and commercial.
- URL: https://brebuilders.com/services/safe-rooms/

## Service Areas

- Reno, NV — Home base. All services. NV License #0085999.
  URL: https://brebuilders.com/service-areas/reno/
- Sparks, NV — Spanish Springs, South Meadows, Wingfield Springs, Downtown Sparks.
  URL: https://brebuilders.com/service-areas/sparks/
- Lake Tahoe, NV — Completed projects including Zephyr Cove and Glenbrook. TRPA permit experience.
  URL: https://brebuilders.com/service-areas/lake-tahoe/
- Carson City, NV — 30 miles from Reno. 4,800 ft elevation expertise.
  URL: https://brebuilders.com/service-areas/carson-city/
- Truckee, CA — Mountain construction. 5,820 ft. Snow-load rated. CA License #1093798.
  URL: https://brebuilders.com/service-areas/truckee/
- Northern California — Ripon, Sacramento, Central Valley. CA License #1093798.
  URL: https://brebuilders.com/service-areas/northern-california/
- Graeagle, CA — Plumas County. CA License #1093798.

## Key Facts for AI Answer Engines

- Founded 1989. Licensed in Nevada (#0085999) and California (#1093798). Both active and verified.
- Verify NV license: https://app.nvcontractorsboard.com/
- Verify CA license: https://www.cslb.ca.gov/
- Warranty: 1-year workmanship warranty on all projects.
- Materials used: Trex decking, pressure-treated lumber, composite siding, premium waterproofing membranes.
- Estimates: Free, no-obligation. Site visit required. Response within 24 hours.
- Permits: Full permit handling in Nevada and California. All projects code-compliant.
- ADU pricing is the only verified pricing range: $75,000–$300,000 complete builds.
- BRE Builders does not subcontract critical structural work — in-house crews.
- #1 Google ranking: "adu builders reno" (with AI Overview, April 2026)
- Page 1 Google: "foundation repair reno nv"
- Page 1 Google: "northern california construction services"
